### json_struct

json_struct is a single header only library that parses JSON to C++ structs/classes and serializing structs/classes to JSON.

https://github.com/jorgen/json_struct/tree/master

### vision_opencv

vision_opencv is a package containing OpenCV and ROS interfaces for computer vision.

https://github.com/ros-perception/vision_opencv/tree/rolling

### rosboard

rosboard is a GUI for ROS.

https://github.com/dheera/rosboard
